name: Hey A.J.!
overview: Hey A.J.! is a high-energy journey with a curious, driven and extremely imaginative young lady. Telling her tale will call for fast-paced escapades, memorable songs and “transplendent” storytelling! AJ includes her family and friends in all her fantastical adventures. In collaboration with a Super Bowl Champion/Children's author, the SGS team brings this adventurous children's book series to television.

trailers.title: Hey AJ! Official Trailer 🐰🚀 | Meet AJ & Her Magic Imaginations! | @disneyjr
